Subject: Inquiry Regarding My Order Number

Dear Support Team,

I am writing to follow up on the repair status of the laptop I brought in earlier this week. Please let me know if there have been any updates regarding the repair status or estimated completion date. I appreciate your assistance in tracking the repair status so I can plan accordingly.

Thank you for your time.

Best regards,
John<|im_end|>
